title: carduus × estivali subsp. carbonelii
intro: Carduus × estivali subsp. carbonelii, a rare hybrid plant species, is a cross between the Italian thistle (Carduus pycnocephalus) and the Sardinian thistle (Carduus carduelas). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Carduus × estivali subsp. carbonelii include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
